channel.title: GitHub Makefile Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Makefile in GitHub

item.title: PartialVolume/shredos.x86_64
item.description: Shredos Disk Eraser 64 bit for all Intel 64 bit processors as well as processors from AMD and other vendors which make compatible 64 bit chips. ShredOS - Secure disk erasure/wipe

item.title: llm-d/llm-d
item.description: llm-d enables high-performance distributed LLM inference on Kubernetes

item.title: foostan/crkbd
item.description: Corne keyboard, a split keyboard with 3x6 column staggered keys and 3 thumb keys.

item.title: open-telemetry/opentelemetry-proto-go
item.description: Generated code for OpenTelemetry protobuf data model

item.title: jobbole/awesome-python-cn
item.description: Python资源大全中文版，包括：Web框架、网络爬虫、模板引擎、数据库、数据可视化、图片处理等，由「开源前哨」和「Python开发者」微信公号团队维护更新。

item.title: 0xType/0xProto
item.description: A programming font focused on source code legibility

item.title: riscv/riscv-memory-tagging
item.description: Memory Tagging ISA extension that can be used by software to enforce memory tag checks on memory loads and stores

item.title: yuk7/ArchWSL
item.description: ArchLinux based WSL Distribution. Supports multiple install.
